purpose: Reusable ComfyUI creative contract for WAMOCON branded assets.

required: flux1-schnell.safetensors is exposed by the pinned core UNETLoader; third-party custom loaders are forbidden.
At least two text encoders are exposed for the selected FLUX workflow.
DualCLIPLoader follows the official FLUX order: clip_name1 is t5xxl_fp8_e4m3fn.safetensors and clip_name2 is clip_l.safetensors.
The selected VAE returns readable model metadata and is not an empty placeholder.
ComfyUI reports the exact nonempty package set required by the full pinned core commit, with no missing, extra, or mismatched package.
The API-format workflow validates before any production queue submission.
The isolated loopback queue is empty before a governed job is submitted.
The candidate root, Git checkout, and all four model files resolve without symbolic links.
Each local model is streamed against its actual file SHA-256; an informational Xet CAS hash cannot satisfy this check.
Fresh history is bound to the runtime identity, four model hashes, exact graph, seed, and fetched output bytes.

inputs.headline: Short approved headline. Max 8 words for covers.
proof_asset_refs: approved screenshot id or brand asset id

rules: Do not invent customer screenshots, logos, people, or claims.
No public output without human visual review.
Track whether any generated media contains synthetic people, voice, or customer-like artifacts.
Pin all ComfyUI custom nodes and model versions before production use.

outputs.source_workflow_hash: sha256 of pinned ComfyUI API-format workflow
model_hashes: sha256 of diffusion model, text encoders, and VAE
outputs.human_visual_approval: separate named-reviewer evidence; never set by the qualification script
